moderationRules: Block phone numbers, emails, addresses, and other personal identifiers.
Block bullying, insults, sexual content, and unsafe links.
Keep parent-visible logs for social learning actions.
Use encouraging academic feedback and avoid shaming.
healthDisclaimer: Health & Wellness content is general education about nutrition, activity, hydration, sleep, and chronic disease prevention. It does not diagnose, treat, or shame children.
faithDisclaimer: Christian Leadership content is optional and parent-controlled.
